name: grok-prompt
description: Send a prompt to xAI's Grok model. Supports system prompts, JSON mode, and temperature control. Useful for classification, correction, summarisation, and generation tasks.

inputs.name: prompt
inputs.description: The user message / prompt to send

inputs.name: system
inputs.description: Optional system prompt to guide behaviour

inputs.name: jsonMode
inputs.description: If true, forces JSON output via response_format

outputs.name: parsed
outputs.description: Parsed JSON if jsonMode was enabled (null otherwise)

credentials.label: xAI API Key
credentials.description: Your xAI API key for Grok access
